# HOS AI

> HOS AI is the AI automation arm of House of Shafaq - a Dubai-based AI automation agency and consultancy that designs and ships production AI systems for businesses across the UK, UAE, India, and Australia.

## What we do
- AI Audit: two-week diagnostic that maps workflows, scores AI-readiness, and picks the highest-leverage wedge.
- Custom Agents: single-purpose agents (triage, drafting, routing, research) embedded directly in the tools a team already uses.
- RAG Systems: production-grade retrieval over internal knowledge (policies, tickets, contracts, wikis).
- Voice & WhatsApp Agents: inbound/outbound voice AI and WhatsApp support agents, built on Ringg and Meta's WhatsApp Business Solution Provider platform.
- Evals & Ops: monitoring, drift detection, and regression testing for AI systems already in production.
- Embedded Team: fractional AI engineering, month-to-month, no lock-in.

## Who we serve
Founders and growing businesses across the UK, UAE, India, and Australia who want to cut labor costs and create new revenue with AI, typically deployed within six weeks.
